description: Every DNS Made Easy operation, plus a local record store for cross-zone search, drift detection, and 'where is this IP used' — instant and offline.

novel_features.name: Cross-zone value provenance
novel_features.description: Find every zone and record whose value or CNAME/MX/ANAME target matches an IP, hostname, or string across your entire account.

novel_features.name: Snapshot drift detection
novel_features.description: Diff the two most recent local sync snapshots and report which records were added, changed, or removed.

novel_features.name: Zone export (BIND/JSON)
novel_features.description: Serialize a zone's records from the local mirror to a standards-compliant BIND zone file or JSON, with no API call.

novel_features.name: DNS-hygiene audit
novel_features.description: Audit every zone for dangling CNAMEs, out-of-range TTLs, zones missing SPF/DMARC/CAA, and duplicate or conflicting records.

novel_features.name: Cross-zone bulk record change
novel_features.description: Select records by value and type across all zones locally, preview the plan, then apply the change via the real multi-record update endpoint per affected zone.

novel_features.name: Stale ACME challenge cleanup
novel_features.description: Find _acme-challenge TXT records across all zones and delete stale or orphaned ones via the real multi-record delete endpoint.
